description: Composition White tennis shorts for men made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a press button and metal zip closure, two insert pockets on the sides and a buttoned welt pocket at the back and mesh panels along the crotch area Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry on low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Built for breathable comfort and with the zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design. These high-performance shorts, created from polyester fabric, wick sweat away from the body and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team them with tees and tennis shoes.
